item.title: Why is Mega Flex Plastics Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 17-Mar, Mega Flex Plastics Ltd witnessed a significant rise in its share price, reaching a new 52-week and all-time high of ₹155.05, marking a 4.94% increase or ₹7.30 gain by 9:14 PM. This surge reflects robust investor confidence and notable outperformance relative to broader market indices and its sector peers. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Prime Fresh Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 17-Mar, Prime Fresh Ltd’s stock price fell by 2.15% to close at ₹225.00, continuing a recent downward trend despite the company’s robust long-term growth and strong quarterly results. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is SIS Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 17-Mar, SIS Ltd’s stock price fell sharply to ₹271.70, marking a decline of 2.53% and hitting a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹271.55. This drop reflects a continuation of a downward trend driven by sustained underperformance relative to market benchmarks and waning investor participation despite recent positive quarterly results. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Parin Enterprises Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 17-Mar, Parin Enterprises Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 5.05% to close at ₹637.85. This drop comes amid a backdrop of mixed performance indicators, with the stock showing strong long-term returns but facing short-term headwinds and underperformance relative to its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Creative Newtech Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 17-Mar, Creative Newtech Ltd’s stock price has fallen to ₹607.65, down by ₹11.9 or 1.92%, marking a continuation of recent declines driven by technical factors and broader market underperformance. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Jet Freight Logistics Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 17-Mar, Jet Freight Logistics Ltd’s stock price rose by 2.22% to ₹18.40, reversing a two-day decline and outperforming its sector. This movement reflects a complex interplay of strong market returns, rising investor interest, and underlying fundamental challenges. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: As of 17-Mar, Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Ltd. experienced a decline in its share price, falling by 1.73% to ₹2,138.00. This movement comes despite the company’s strong financial performance over recent periods and a generally positive long-term outlook. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Genus Paper & Boards Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 17-Mar, Genus Paper & Boards Ltd witnessed a decline in its share price, closing at ₹11.24 with a drop of 1.4%, reflecting ongoing challenges despite some positive operational results. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Kalpataru Projects International Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 17-Mar, Kalpataru Projects International Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 3.23% to close at ₹1,054.10. This drop comes amid a series of short-term challenges despite the company’s robust long-term financial performance and market position. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Perfect Infraengineers Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 17-Mar, Perfect Infraengineers Ltd witnessed a further decline in its share price, hitting a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹1.75, reflecting ongoing challenges and a sustained negative trend that has significantly underperformed the broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Hinduja Global Solutions Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 17-Mar, Hinduja Global Solutions Ltd’s stock price has continued its downward trajectory, reflecting persistent challenges in the company’s financial health and market performance. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Hisar Metal Industries Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 17-Mar, Hisar Metal Industries Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling 3.21% to close at ₹146.45, marking a fresh 52-week low. This downturn contrasts sharply with gains in its broader sector, reflecting a combination of technical pressures and underperformance relative to market benchmarks. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Styrenix Performance Materials Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 17-Mar, Styrenix Performance Materials Ltd’s stock price has fallen sharply by 4.76% to ₹1,887.90, continuing a downward trend amid disappointing quarterly earnings and sustained underperformance relative to broader market indices. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Indian Infotech and Software Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 17-Mar, Indian Infotech and Software Ltd recorded a 5.77% rise in its share price, closing at ₹0.55. This increase, while notable for the day, contrasts sharply with the stock's sustained underperformance over longer periods against the broader market benchmarks. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Wipro Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 17-Mar, Wipro Ltd. witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹191.25, down ₹3.65 or 1.87%, marking a continuation of a downward trend that has persisted over the past week and year-to-date. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Apollo Tyres Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 17-Mar, Apollo Tyres Ltd. witnessed a notable uptick in its share price, rising by 2.2% to close at ₹421.95. This movement comes after a period of underperformance relative to the broader market, yet reflects a short-term rebound supported by recent positive trading momentum and underlying financial strengths. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Vidhi Specialty Food Ingredients Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 17-Mar, Vidhi Specialty Food Ingredients Ltd witnessed a significant decline in its share price, falling 5.19% to close at ₹272.90. This drop reflects a continuation of a downward trend amid disappointing financial performance and valuation pressures. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Zuari Industries Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 17-Mar, Zuari Industries Ltd’s stock price has continued its downward trajectory, reflecting a sustained period of underperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is United Spirits Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 17-Mar, United Spirits Ltd witnessed a decline in its share price, closing at ₹1,300.05, down by ₹16.25 or 1.23%. This drop reflects a broader trend of underperformance relative to both its sector and benchmark indices, driven by valuation pressures and subdued recent results. Time: 6 hours ago
